items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has vulnerabilities on the feet.
items.quote: Pimlet's got vulnerabilities on the feet.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis fights with his chin up in the air.
items.quote: Benois is chin aoy up in the air ready to get slammed out.

items.claim: Dan Hooker showed decent takedown defense against Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: He actually had decent moments of takedown defense there where he stopped Benois's grappling

items.claim: Dan Hooker made poor decisions by engaging in 50/50 grappling exchanges against Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: he would like engage himself there, try and win a 50/50 and end up on bottom against Benois Sondir.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis was timid and vulnerable after being hurt to the body in the first round against Dan Hooker.
items.quote: in the first round, Benois was like a timid boy out there. He got hurt to the body in the first round and he was so vulnerable.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been dropped in recent fights.
items.quote: Even though he has been dropped recently, I understand.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff and a broken leg.
items.quote: is he gonna come back after five years off after breaking his leg
